summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. All five listed PRs remain open and independent; no close, merge, fix, or security routing action is safe or allowed from this job.

actions.reason: Independent open PR with proof and review blockers; not a duplicate, not superseded by a hydrated canonical item, and low-signal closeout is disabled.
Independent open PR with an active author/review path and unresolved correctness feedback; no closure action is supported.
Independent active fix PR with proof and useful contributor work; keep open for maintainer review rather than closing or merging from this plan-only inventory shard.
Independent open PR linked to an open issue and still missing required behavior proof; no duplicate or low-signal close path is available.
Independent feature/hardening PR with proof and P1 review blockers; no close, merge, or fix action is allowed by this plan-only job.
